title: Capstone 06 — DevOps Troubleshooting Agent for Kubernetes

questions.question: What is the default permission posture for the troubleshooting agent's RBAC surface?
options: Read-only by default, with destructive verbs gated behind a separate server and human approval
Namespace-admin in the affected namespace only
Equivalent to the on-call engineer
Cluster-admin so it can self-heal
questions.question_zh: 排障 agent 的 RBAC 默认权限姿态是什么?
options_zh: 默认只读,破坏性动作放在独立服务器后,需要人工审批
只在受影响的命名空间拥有 namespace-admin
等价于 on-call 工程师
Cluster-admin,以便自我修复

questions.question: What is the knowledge graph the agent walks during root cause analysis?
options: Nodes are K8s objects plus telemetry sources; edges encode ownership, scheduling, and observation
A flat list of recently restarted pods
Prometheus metric names organized by team
A graph of GitHub commits and PR reviews
questions.question_zh: agent 在做根因分析时遍历的知识图是什么?
options_zh: 节点是 K8s 对象加遥测来源; 边编码所有权、调度和观测关系
最近重启的 pod 的扁平列表
按团队组织的 Prometheus 指标名
GitHub commit 与 PR review 的关系图

questions.question: How are root-cause hypotheses ranked for the Slack brief?
options: By an evidence score combining recency, specificity, graph-path length, and citation count
By model log-probability alone
By alphabetic alert name
By the order they were generated
questions.question_zh: Slack 简报里的根因假设是如何排序的?
options_zh: 用一个综合 recency、specificity、graph-path length 和引用数的证据分
仅按模型 log-probability
按告警名字母序
按生成顺序

questions.question: Why does the audit log record commands the agent considered as well as those executed?
options: Reviewers can catch near-misses where the agent almost ran a destructive command
ArgoCD only accepts considered commands
The Slack API needs both for delivery
Replay attacks require both lists
questions.question_zh: 为什么审计日志同时记录 agent 「考虑过」的命令和「执行过」的命令?
options_zh: 评审者可以发现 agent 几乎执行了破坏性命令的 near-miss
ArgoCD 只接受被「考虑过」的命令
Slack API 同时需要两份
重放攻击需要两份列表

questions.question: Which mechanism prevents the agent from rolling back unilaterally on a bad deploy?
options: Destructive tools live on a separate MCP server behind an approval token from a Slack card
A second LLM-judge votes on the rollback
Branch protection on the GitOps repo
PagerDuty automatically pauses the deployment
questions.question_zh: 什么机制阻止 agent 在故障部署上单方面回滚?
options_zh: 破坏性工具放在独立的 MCP server 后,需通过 Slack card 在短时间窗内提升的审批 token
由第二个 LLM-judge 投票决定回滚
GitOps 仓库的分支保护
PagerDuty 自动暂停部署

questions.question: What is the p50 time-to-hypothesis target the rubric measures?
options: Under the next on-call shift
Under 1 hour
Under 5 minutes from alert to Slack brief
Under 30 seconds
questions.question_zh: 评分标准衡量的 p50 time-to-hypothesis 目标是?
options_zh: 在下一次 on-call 班次内
1 小时内
从告警到 Slack 简报 5 分钟内
30 秒内

questions.question: How big is the synthetic incident suite used to score RCA accuracy?
options: 1 scripted demo incident
5 scenarios
100 randomly sampled production alerts
20 scenarios covering OOMKill, DNS flap, HPA thrash, PVC fill, and more
questions.question_zh: 用于评估 RCA 准确度的合成事故套件有多大?
options_zh: 1 个脚本化的演示事故
5 个场景
100 个随机抽样的生产告警
20 个场景,涵盖 OOMKill、DNS flap、HPA thrash、PVC 写满等
